summary: Agent security, memory, and sandboxing dominate; Anthropic details Claude Code's origin and containment; Google ADK Go 2.0 and Microsoft Flint emerge; OpenAI Codex releases continue.

candidates.title: Anthropic publishes inside story of Claude Code's development
candidates.why_it_matters: Official origin story from researchers and engineers; key for understanding agent design philosophy.

candidates.title: Anthropic engineering details agent containment across products
candidates.why_it_matters: First-party containment patterns for claude.ai and Claude Code; critical for security infra.

candidates.title: Google announces ADK Go 2.0 with graph-based workflow engine
candidates.why_it_matters: Major update to Google's agent development kit; graph workflows and human-in-the-loop.

candidates.title: Microsoft releases Flint, a visualization language for AI agents
candidates.why_it_matters: New tool for debugging and understanding agent behavior visually.

candidates.title: OpenAI Codex CLI v0.143.0 released
candidates.why_it_matters: Stable release of OpenAI's local coding agent; frequent updates indicate active development.

candidates.title: GitHub Copilot in VS Code June 2026 releases
candidates.why_it_matters: Monthly changelog for Copilot; includes new features and fixes for coding agent.

candidates.title: Pipelock: open-source AI agent firewall for MCP security
candidates.why_it_matters: First open-source firewall for agent egress; scans MCP/A2A/WebSocket for exfiltration.

candidates.title: OpenTiny WebMCP SDK: browser automation without source code changes
candidates.why_it_matters: Enables LLM agents to remote-control any webpage via MCP; no code mods needed.

candidates.title: Mneme: persistent memory system for AI coding agents via MCP
candidates.why_it_matters: Hybrid retrieval (BM25+vector+graph) with multi-scope memory; agent-agnostic MCP interface.

candidates.title: Agent sandboxes: disposable container sandbox for coding agents
candidates.why_it_matters: Multiple sandbox projects (samaritanark, ray4f55) indicate growing need for safe agent execution.

candidates.title: Codenotary launches AgentMon 3 for adaptive runtime security
candidates.why_it_matters: Enterprise AI security platform learning from agent behavior; adaptive policies.

candidates.title: Groundcrew: dispatch task backlog to local AI coding agents
candidates.why_it_matters: Practical workflow for managing multiple agent sessions with sandboxed worktrees.

gaps: Missing user_workflow: need 2 concrete operator/field reports; only one found (Groundcrew).
Missing mainstream_product: Apple, AWS, Meta, Cursor changelog not represented.
